briefdescription.para: Command is in progress by ASUFW.
Command DMA wait operation is complete.
Command execution is complete by ASUFW.
Response status index in response buffer.
Response buffer address index in response buffer.
Mask for command ID in header.
Mask for command unique request ID.
Shift value for unique request ID.
Maximum unique IDs generated by ASU.
Mask for command length in header.
Mask for secure bit in command header.
Shift for secure flag in command header.
ASUFW run time configuration area base address.
Base address of module info of size (180 bytes)
Base address of execution status of size 1 byte.
Base address of maximum size of key vault.
Maximum IPI channels supported by ASUFW.
Pointer to the IPI communication channel information received from user configuration.
This function provides subsystem ID based on IPI mask.

listitem.para: Returns subsystem ID correspond to IPI mask.
XASU_INVALID_SUBSYS_ID if no matching IPI mask is found.

briefdescription.para: This function returns IPI Mask corresponding to the Channel Index.
This header file defines the structures that are used for shared memory communication between the client and the server.

detaileddescription.para: The structures include definitions for message formats, shared memory control blocks, and any other relevant data structures needed for inter-process communication

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 vns 06/04/24 Initial release ma 07/08/24 Add task based approach at queue level ma 07/23/24 Update XASU_RESPONSE_STATUS_INDEX with 0 1.1 ma 12/12/24 Updated command states ma 02/19/25 Updated handling of same priority queue requests in round robin scheduling ma 02/26/25 Corrected XASU_CHANNEL_RESERVED_MEM define value rmv 07/30/25 Updated XAsu_CommChannel structure
